channel.title: Life on Prabhat Reddy
channel.description: Recent content in Life on Prabhat Reddy

item.title: Sleep
item.description: I get an average of 5 hours of sleep per day. Five hours. It wasn't always like this. There were times when I slept around 8 hours a day. That's the recommended number of hours of sleep one must get right? I heard that different people tend to sleep different amounts of time, but I'm pretty sure that 5 hours is not in the set of all recommended durations of sleep for a human being.

item.title: Taking Care of Yourself
item.description: I don't think I take proper care of myself. It's not that I have good intentions, but somehow those intentions do not seem to translate into actions. I want to eat healthy food 3 times a day, drink plenty of water everyday, take 2 baths a day, read news everyday, learn something new everyday, talk to my parents everyday and do many more things! But I look at my lifestyle and I look at the list of things I want to do above, and I think to myself "How in the world can I do all that in a day?
